description: Two-panel split-screen infographic on inflation under Biden and under Trump. The top half shows a profile photograph of Joe Biden in a dark suit and blue striped tie against blurred U.S. flags; on the right is a large red box reading '9.1%' with white serif text below: 'Inflation under Biden' and smaller text 'Highest during presidency - June 2022', plus '@PressSec on X'. A thin divider band with the engraved White House logo separates the panels. The bottom half shows a photograph of Trump in a dark overcoat and red scarf speaking at a podium (seal visible) against red-and-white striped bunting with flowers in the foreground; at left is a large green box reading '2.7%' with white serif text 'Inflation under Trump' and smaller 'Average during presidency', plus 'White House'.
notable_text: 9.1% Inflation under Biden (Highest during presidency - June 2022); 2.7% Inflation under Trump (Average during presidency)
